description: Style NoteFeaturing the German actor Thomas Kretschmann in the Ad campaign, boss Selectionfrom hugo boss is a blend of lively and fresh green notes, juicy grapefruit and mandarin, along with spicy pink peppercorn. Geranium and cedar leaves, star anise and petitgrain form the heart while patchouli, vetyver, cedarwood, heliotrope and musky notes accentuate the masculine character of this fragrance. Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
